student_reviews.pros: Great friends, world travel opportunities, great job placement, supportive student body, vast alumni network, curriculum flexibility
student_reviews.cons: Can get overwhelmed, recruiting starts immediately

student_reviews.pros: Fantastic school, flexible curriculum, great for independent people, strong brand, helped secure PE internship without banking experience
student_reviews.cons: Not strong cohort system, need to go extra mile to know classmates

student_reviews.pros: Create your own adventure approach, good career services, strong in banking/consulting/investment management
student_reviews.cons: Culture not as intellectual as advertised, many employers don't recruit on campus

student_reviews.pros: Exceeded expectations, amazing learning pace, kind and smart colleagues, world-class entrepreneurship program
student_reviews.cons: Not for those who need hand-holding, can be hard to find important information

student_reviews.pros: Equal to top schools, unmatched faculty and curriculum, stepped up financial aid
